items.question: Do you offer job assistance?
items.answer: We focus on career readiness and 100% skill assurance. Our data shows that 95% of our rigorously trained freshers secure multiple offers within 3 months of completion. We provide intense referrals, but you must clear the interview.

items.question: Can I upgrade from the 4-week to the 8-week program?
items.answer: Yes, you can upgrade within the first 2 weeks by simply paying the difference. We highly recommend the 8-week Launchpad for complete mock interview and AI-tool coverage.

items.question: Are the live sessions recorded if I miss one?
items.answer: Absolutely. Every live session is recorded and uploaded to your student portal within 12 hours. You retain access to all resources and recordings for 1 full year.

items.question: How do the 1-on-1 personalized sessions work?
items.answer: In the 8-week Launchpad, you get four 45-minute strict 1-on-1 sessions. These are used for personalized resume teardowns, private mock interviews, and specific salary negotiation advice.

items.question: Will you help me rewrite my Resume?
items.answer: Yes. In Week 2, our ATS experts will physically review your resume line-by-line and help you craft bullet points that highlight college projects as high-tier corporate experience.

items.title: How to Write an ATS-Friendly Resume in 2025
items.excerpt: Over 75% of resumes are rejected by ATS bots before a human ever sees them. Learn the precise formatting and keyword strategies to beat the system.
items.content:
In today's highly competitive corporate landscape, getting noticed is half the battle. You might have the perfect degree and the exact skill set required, but if your presentation lacks impact, your application will likely fall through the cracks.

Recruiters spend an average of 7 seconds scanning a resume. The Applicant Tracking Systems (ATS) are even more ruthless, automatically discarding up to 75% of applications before a human even sees them.

* **Keywords are King:** Tailor your content matching the exact phrases used in the job description.
* **Formatting Matters:** Avoid complex tables or multi-column layouts that confuse parsing software.
* **Quantify Results:** Never just list duties. Use numbers to show the impact you made (e.g., "Increased efficiency by 20%").

items.title: Why First Impressions Matter (The 7-Second Rule)
items.excerpt: Recruiters decide whether they like you in the first 7 seconds of an interview. Here is how body language and vocal tonality can make or break you.

items.title: Top AI Tools for Job Seekers in India
items.excerpt: Stop applying manually. Uncover the top AI automation tools that can tailor your cover letters and mass-apply to relevant jobs for you.

items.title: GD Tips: How to Stand Out Without Shouting
items.excerpt: The biggest myth about Group Discussions is that the loudest person wins. Learn the frameworks to take control of the narrative gracefully.

items.title: How LinkedIn Optimization Gets You Noticed
items.excerpt: Your LinkedIn headline is your digital billboard. Learn how to optimize your profile so recruiters message you with opportunities first.

items.title: The Tier-3 Jobs Problem (And How to Beat It)
items.excerpt: Students from Tier-3 colleges have significantly fewer campus recruitment opportunities. Here is the step-by-step off-campus strategy to secure a 10+ LPA package.
